description: The Cataldo are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cetraro, Italy, with strong presence also in Portigliola, Gerace, and Antonimina. They are allied with the Marafioti and historical rivals of the Cordì. Their illicit activities include drug and arms trafficking, and infiltration into public works and contracts. They have been involved in a long-running feud with the Cordì since the 1960s, with violent clashes continuing into the 2000s.

country_links.evidence_quote: I Sergi e i Marando importavano cocaina, marijuana e eroina dal Marocco e dalla Colombia
country_links.context: The Cataldo organization's associates imported drugs from Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico di armi passante da Malta , dalla Sicilia e dalla Francia
country_links.context: The Cataldo organization routed arms through France.
